title: Borrow Their Arrows!
description: Allow you to pick any arrow.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d307119c410ccfeb307c274eaa774c6801c9f1ad.jpeg)

**A lightweight mod that allows you to pick mobs' arrows, so you can Borrow Their Arrows!**

Skeletons belike: Ouch, wait! Ain't it my arrow???)

**About the banner:**

In ancient China, there is a well-known classic anecdote called Borrowing Arrows with Thatched Boats.

During the Three Kingdoms Period, Zhou Yu was very jealous of Zhuge Liang's talent, so he troubled him by demanding 100,000 arrows within only three days. it was impossible to make such amounts of arrows in such a short time.

But Zhuge Liang calculated precisely and foresaw a heavy foggy day. He took several boats strung with straw figures, and sailed them close to Cao Cao's camp. Being a suspicious man by nature, Cao Cao ordered his soldiers to shoot arrows, and all the arrows stuck straight into the straw figures.

In the end, Zhuge Liang fulfilled the mission of impossible and Zhou Yu's scheme against him failed.


<details>
<summary>Chinese translation </summary>

在中国古代有一个典故，名为草船借箭。
三国时期，周瑜故意刁难诸葛亮，让他十天内造十万支箭。
诸葛亮算准大雾天，用多条扎满草人的船逼近曹营。曹操多疑，下令射箭，箭全扎在草人上。
诸葛亮轻松借到十万支箭，如期交差，周瑜的计谋试失算了。

</details>
